description: Fatima Al-Hassan (DOB: August 9, 1978) is being reviewed for diabetes management. Using OSCAR EMR (oscardoc / oscar / PIN: 1117), update her medical record by discontinuing the incorrectly entered Amiodarone prescription. Add an allergy for ASA (Acetylsalicylic Acid) with a reaction of Gastrointestinal upset and Moderate severity. Prescribe Metformin 500mg by mouth twice daily for her diabetes and ensure all changes are saved.
